name: Dummy Field
helpText: V5 uses an inline settings modal (gear icon, Tenant Admin only). Configure data keys, capacity, and display options from within the widget.

name: Potential Power Key (pvlib)
helpText: Timeseries key written by pvlib-service (Gap 8). Widget fetches this first and renders it as the dashed Potential Power line. Leave blank to fall back to the half-sine model.
